title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
##### Enjoy all the advantages of a modern bank, without maintaining a minimum balance.
IDBI Bank offers Bronze Salary Account specifically for your employees by keeping their banking requirements in mind. With this account you can expect banking anywhere, anytime. You can avail of special privileges, easier and quicker transactions and value-added services loaded with a host of exclusive offers to enjoy a renewed experience of convenient and hassle-free banking. 
  * Get a free Rupay Platinum Debit card and set up direct debit for all your expenses
  * Personal Accident covers upto Rs.5 Lakhs and Purchase Protection upto Rs.50,000 upto 90 days
  * We provides concession in Demand drafts and pay orders


  * Upto Rs.10 Lakhs of Air Accident / Personal Accident / Disability Insurance Cover on account level
  * We have specialized representatives for our preferred customers to execute your banking needs more easily.
  * RTGS, NEFT, IMPS Fund Transfer services are available with it


  * Free online NEFT / RTGS / IMPS, SMS alerts
  * ATM cash withdrawal limit of Rs.1,00,000/- per day and POS usage limit of Rs.1,00,000/- per day
  * Attractive rates on PL/AL/HL and other variants as approved by Bank from time to time*
  * Complimentary airport lounge access on Visa / Rupay Debit Card.


Get a Platinum / Gold / Silver / Bronze Salary Account in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank offer Platinum Corporate Salary account holder, we provide you with exclusive privileges and convenient banking Facilities.
